zh.lifeSummary: Eleanor於大約1549年出生在英國倫敦。她於大約1573年與Thomas Barber結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1620年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Eleanor was born about 1549, in London, England. She married Thomas Barber about 1573. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1620, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Eleanor est née environ 1549, à Londres, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Barber environ 1573. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1620, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanorは約1549年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた。約1573年にThomas Barberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1620年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor(은)는 대략 1549년 영국 런던에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1573년 Thomas Barber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1620년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

Ela faleceu em 1620, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Eleanor родилась около 1549 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Barber около 1573 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1620 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
